queries.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT id, name FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE age = 25
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM users WHERE (age = 25)

queries.sql: SELECT age * 2 AS double_age FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT (age * 2) AS double_age FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT (age + 5) * 10 FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT ((age + 5) * 10) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT -5 + 10 * 2 AS math_test FROM math
queries.expected: SELECT (-5 + (10 * 2)) AS math_test FROM math

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE a < 10 AND b > 20
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE ((a < 10) AND (20 < b))

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (a = 1 OR b = 2) AND c = 3
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (((a = 1) OR (b = 2)) AND (c = 3))

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE a = 1 OR b = 2 AND c = 3
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE ((a = 1) OR ((b = 2) AND (c = 3)))

queries.sql: SELECT name FROM t WHERE name LIKE '%smith%'
queries.expected: SELECT name FROM t WHERE (name LIKE '%smith%')

queries.sql: SELECT name FROM t WHERE name NOT LIKE 'admin%'
queries.expected: SELECT name FROM t WHERE (name NOT LIKE 'admin%')

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE status IN ('active', 'pending')
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (status IN ('active', 'pending'))

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE id NOT IN (1, 2, 3)
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (id NOT IN (1, 2, 3))

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE age BETWEEN 18 AND 65
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (age BETWEEN 18 AND 65)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE age NOT BETWEEN 13 AND 19
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (age NOT BETWEEN 13 AND 19)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE is_admin IS TRUE
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (is_admin IS TRUE)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE is_guest IS FALSE
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (is_guest IS FALSE)

queries.sql: SELECT a FROM t WHERE NOT is_deleted AND status = 'active'
queries.expected: SELECT a FROM t WHERE ((NOT is_deleted) AND (status = 'active'))

queries.sql: SELECT name FROM t WHERE name = 'O''Connor'
queries.expected: SELECT name FROM t WHERE (name = 'O''Connor')

queries.sql: SELECT CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT LOWER(email) FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT LOWER(email) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT UPPER(status) FROM orders
queries.expected: SELECT UPPER(status) FROM orders

queries.sql: SELECT TRIM(name) FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT TRIM(name) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT SUBSTR(name, 1, 5) FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT SUBSTR(name, 1, 5) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT LENGTH(password_hash) FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT LENGTH(password_hash) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT COALESCE(phone, email, 'N/A') FROM contacts
queries.expected: SELECT COALESCE(phone, email, 'N/A') FROM contacts

queries.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM orders
queries.expected: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM orders

queries.sql: SELECT AVG(score) FROM reviews
queries.expected: SELECT AVG(score) FROM reviews

queries.sql: SELECT MIN(price), MAX(price) FROM products
queries.expected: SELECT MIN(price), MAX(price) FROM products

queries.sql: SELECT ROUND(price) FROM products
queries.expected: SELECT ROUND(price) FROM products

queries.sql: SELECT ROUND(price, 2) FROM products
queries.expected: SELECT ROUND(price, 2) FROM products

queries.sql: SELECT FLOOR(rating), CEIL(rating) FROM reviews
queries.expected: SELECT FLOOR(rating), CEIL(rating) FROM reviews

queries.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT NOW() FROM system
queries.expected: SELECT NOW() FROM system

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE created_at > TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00'
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM events WHERE (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00' < created_at)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE created_at < NOW() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM events WHERE (created_at < (NOW() + INTERVAL 1 DAY))

queries.sql: SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
queries.expected: SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users AS u INNER JOIN orders AS o ON (u.id = o.user_id)

queries.sql: SELECT a.id, b.id, c.id FROM table_a a LEFT JOIN table_b b ON a.b_id = b.id RIGHT JOIN table_c c ON b.c_id = c.id
queries.expected: SELECT a.id, b.id, c.id FROM table_a AS a LEFT JOIN table_b AS b ON (a.b_id = b.id) RIGHT JOIN table_c AS c ON (b.c_id = c.id)

queries.sql: SELECT department, SUM(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department HAVING SUM(salary) >= 1000000
queries.expected: SELECT department, SUM(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department HAVING (1000000 <= SUM(salary))

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM leaderboard ORDER BY score DESC, time ASC LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM leaderboard ORDER BY score DESC, time ASC LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM pagination LIMIT 100 / 10 OFFSET 5 * 2
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM pagination LIMIT (100 / 10) OFFSET (5 * 2)

queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN age > 18 THEN 'adult' ELSE 'minor' END AS age_group FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT CASE WHEN (18 < age) THEN 'adult' ELSE 'minor' END AS age_group FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN score >= 90 THEN 'A' WHEN score >= 80 THEN 'B' ELSE 'F' END FROM grades
queries.expected: SELECT CASE WHEN (90 <= score) THEN 'A' WHEN (80 <= score) THEN 'B' ELSE 'F' END FROM grades

queries.sql: SELECT id % 10 AS cohort FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT (id % 10) AS cohort FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT base ^ 2 AS squared FROM math
queries.expected: SELECT (base ^ 2) AS squared FROM math

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(email, '^.*@gmail\.com$')
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM users WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(email, '^.*@gmail\.com$')

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email ~ '^.*@gmail\.com$'
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM users WHERE (email ~ '^.*@gmail\.com$')

queries.sql: SELECT REPLACE(name, 'foo', 'bar') AS clean_name FROM t
queries.expected: SELECT REPLACE(name, 'foo', 'bar') AS clean_name FROM t

queries.sql: SELECT POSITION('@' IN email) AS domain_start FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT POSITION('@' IN email) AS domain_start FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT SPLIT_PART(full_name, ' ', 1) AS first_name FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT SPLIT_PART(full_name, ' ', 1) AS first_name FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT total / NULLIF(count, 0) AS average FROM stats
queries.expected: SELECT (total / NULLIF(count, 0)) AS average FROM stats

queries.sql: SELECT metadata->>'browser' AS browser FROM logs
queries.expected: SELECT (metadata ->> 'browser') AS browser FROM logs

queries.sql: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.browser') FROM logs
queries.expected: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.browser') FROM logs

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE permissions & 4 > 0
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM users WHERE (0 < (permissions & 4))

queries.sql: SELECT flags | 1 AS new_flags FROM system
queries.expected: SELECT (flags | 1) AS new_flags FROM system

queries.sql: SELECT first_name || ' ' || last_name AS full_name FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT ((first_name || ' ') || last_name) AS full_name FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT CAST(age AS DOUBLE) FROM users
queries.expected: SELECT CAST(age AS DOUBLE) FROM users

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE val1 IS DISTINCT FROM val2
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (val1 IS DISTINCT FROM val2)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE val1 IS NOT DISTINCT FROM val2
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM t WHERE (val1 IS NOT DISTINCT FROM val2)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT id FROM users) AS virt
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM (SELECT id FROM users) AS virt

queries.sql: SELECT virt.id, virt.total FROM (SELECT id, total FROM orders WHERE status = 'shipped') virt WHERE virt.total > 100
queries.expected: SELECT virt.id, virt.total FROM (SELECT id, total FROM orders WHERE (status = 'shipped')) AS virt WHERE (100 < virt.total)

queries.sql: SELECT u.name, o.total FROM users u INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id) AS o ON u.id = o.user_id
queries.expected: SELECT u.name, o.total FROM users AS u INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id) AS o ON (u.id = o.user_id)

queries.sql: SELECT a.id, b.cnt FROM table_a a LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT a_id, CONT(1) AS cnt FROM table_b GROUP BY a_id) b ON a.id = b.a_id
queries.expected: SELECT a.id, b.cnt FROM table_a AS a LEFT JOIN (SELECT a_id, CONT(1) AS cnt FROM table_b GROUP BY a_id) AS b ON (a.id = b.a_id)

queries.sql: SELECT max_val FROM (SELECT MAX(val) AS max_val FROM (SELECT val FROM data WHERE active IS TRUE) AS inner_data) AS outer_data
queries.expected: SELECT max_val FROM (SELECT MAX(val) AS max_val FROM (SELECT val FROM data WHERE (active IS TRUE)) AS inner_data) AS outer_data

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT a FROM t1) t1 JOIN (SELECT b FROM t2) t2 ON t1.a = t2.b
queries.expected: SELECT * FROM (SELECT a FROM t1) AS t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT b FROM t2) AS t2 ON (t1.a = t2.b)

queries.sql: SELECT user_id, avg_order FROM (SELECT user_id, AVG(total) AS avg_order FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING AVG(total) > 50) AS high_rollers ORDER BY avg_order DESC
queries.expected: SELECT user_id, avg_order FROM (SELECT user_id, AVG(total) AS avg_order FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING (50 < AVG(total))) AS high_rollers ORDER BY avg_order DESC
